headline: A Look At FactSet Research Systems (FDS) Valuation After Bamco Stake Increase And New AI Compliance Tools
summary: FactSet Research Systems (FDS) is back on investors’ radars after Bamco Inc lifted its stake to US$838 million, alongside new AI driven financial crime risk tools added to the FactSet Workstation platform. See our latest analysis for FactSet Research Systems. Despite Bamco’s higher stake and the recent AI product rollout, FactSet’s share price performance has been weak, with a 90 day share price return of 29.8% and a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 52.5%, pointing to fading...

headline: Dollar Tree Swings to Profit, Issues Cautious Forecast
summary: Dollar Tree swung to a profit in its fiscal fourth quarter as sales jumped, but its guidance suggests a more measured pace of growth ahead.
